authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — supersedes SPY-price momentum proxy
signal_definition: VIX>=20 AND ribbon ALIGNED (BULL for bullish/BEAR for bearish) AND momentum_acceleration fires; 45-min cooldown
strike_convention_verified: simulator_real.py L357-364: PUT strike=atm-offset, CALL strike=atm+offset => negative=ITM, positive=OTM for both sides (anti-pattern 2.2 guard passed)

direction_split.note: bull-tilt check: compare bullish vs bearish avg_pnl. Bull should lose less / earn more on options.

honest_verdict: CONDITIONAL edge — chandelier-dependent, NOT a default-exit edge. At DEFAULT v15 exits the momentum_accel family LOSES on real fills at every (strike x stop) cell (baseline prod strike-2_stop-8 = $-4.9/trade; full ATM chart-stop baseline = -$733 total / -$21/trade). It only turns positive when (a) sizing moves OTM (offset 0/+1/+2 — ITM is negative everywhere), (b) the premium stop is TIGHT (-8% or -20%; -50%/-99% are negative), AND (c) the v15 chandelier trailing-stop (profit_lock trailing 0.20) is ON. Under those three, 5 OTM cells clear the bar; best = strike+0_stop-8__tp10.3_rt2.0_trailing_trail0.2 (OOS/trade=$82.0, n=35, positive_quarters=4/5, top5_day_pct=103.0). It is broad-based, NOT a lone survivor: positive across 3 adjacent OTM strikes and 9/12 exit combos, healthy day-concentration (top5 94-160%), and BOTH IS and OOS net positive (IS ~+$1028, OOS ~+$1027 on the best cell). CAVEATS J must weigh: (1) only 5 quarters have data (VIX>=20 is sparse — 2025Q3 empty), so 'positive_quarters>=4/6' is met as 4/5; (2) the exit grid was a SECOND optimization pass on cells pre-filtered for OOS-positivity (multiple-comparisons risk, anti-pattern 2.10) — mitigated by the breadth above; (3) WR is low (~31%), so this is a positive-EXPECTANCY runner (OP-14), not a high-hit-rate setup; (4) runner_target_premium_pct is a DEAD knob here (L148 — 2.0/2.5/3.0 identical; 0DTE runners never reach a 2x+ target). RECOMMENDATION: file the A/B scorecard and SHIP the OTM+tight-stop+chandelier config for momentum_accel under standing authorization (OOS+, broad-based, DSR-style robust), with the chandelier-dependence + 5-quarter-N flagged for REVOKE — NOT default v15 exits.

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: avg_pnl IS per-trade expectancy (OP-14) — reported alongside WR, not WR alone
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 calendar year, OOS=2026 YTD through 2026-05-15
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 WINNING days as % of total P&L (OP-20 #5)
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: SPY-price momentum != option edge (C3/L58); this is the option-edge test
DISCLOSURE.no_cherry_pick: every positive-but-failing cell reported with clears_bar=false + reason (anti-pattern 2.10)
DISCLOSURE.opra_coverage: no_data per cell = signals whose strike/expiry contract is not in the OPRA cache (far ITM/OTM on volatile days)
DISCLOSURE.account_scaling: qty=3; ATM ~ $300-600/trade fits the $2K Safe per-trade cap
